    Restaurante Hondureño Bustillo Matute is a Honduran restaurant in McHenry, Illinois, known for authentic, fresh, and delicious food like Caldo De Res, Tamales, and Platano Relleno, with highlights including fast service and friendly staff. They offer dine-in, takeout, catering, and serve breakfast, lunch, and dinner, with vegetarian options available. 
    Links
      +7
      Restaurante Hondureño Bustillo Matute is a Honduran restaurant in McHenry, Illinois, known for authentic, fresh, and delicious food like Caldo De Res, Tamales, and Platano Relleno, with highlights including fast service and friendly staff. They offer dine-in, takeout, catering, and serve breakfast, lunch, and dinner, with vegetarian options available. 
      Key features
      • Cuisine: Authentic Honduran comfort food.
      • Popular dishes: Caldo De Res, Tamales, Platano Relleno.
      • Service: Fast service, friendly and attentive staff, offers table service.
      • Dining options: Dine-in, takeout, catering, breakfast, lunch, dinner.
      • Dietary options: Vegetarian options available, but no vegan options.
      • Reservations: Accepts reservations, but they are not required. 
      • Leah Loversky
        Local Guide
        2 years ago
        …plantain with ground beef and both were delicious. The food came out fast and they give you tasty plantain bites to snack on while you wait. Highly recommend!
      • Bridget Jewell
        Local Guide
        1 year ago
        I’ve never tried Honduran food before but I really enjoyed it! The food seemed authentic and the staff was really friendly and responsive.

        ⁦Google review summary⁩
        4.8(138)

        Reviews are automatically processed to detect inappropriate content like fake reviews and spam. We may take down reviews that are flagged in order to comply with Google policies or legal obligations.

        Diners like this Honduran restaurant's authentic and delicious food, with many highlighting the pupusas, fish fillet, and carne asada. They also mention the generous portions and reasonable prices. Guests appreciate the friendly staff, quick service, and comfortable, bright atmosphere.
        +14
        Summarized by AI. Learn more . Opens in new tab

        "Very friendly staff, good music, quick service, and so much tasty food."
        "They gave us a yummy fried plantain appetizer after we ordered."
        "Delicious food, the service was good, and they had some good vegetarian options!"
